TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Smangus, title = Smangus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Smangus} }

S.FORM: Smangus ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 38 buwan, 176 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 173 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, Amis 1%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. lalu' na qalang Smangus hya ga "qalang na yaba' utux kayal" uzi. Smangus hya ga cyux maki sa qalang rgyax na Nahuy squ Sincik, 1,500 meta qu kinqwagiq nya. Smangus ga Cyens syang Yufong cun te 14 ling ka llyung blblaq. 'Tayal kwara' qu cyux maki squ Smangus. cyux maki squ zzik balay rgyax qu Smangus, ru yaqih qu tuqi' nya, ru ini' wahi rengki', yasa sllwan ssquliq mha "qalang mnkum", ru hiya qu cyux maki squ zzik balay rgyax na qalang ka kwara' qalang Gyencumin Taywan. ki'an cingay Yaya' qparung, ru wahan lmosay mita' mcisal llpung hogal. pzyang balay hopa' qalang cyux mksobih sa Smangus ga qalang Cikuto, ana ga aring Cikuto ga cyugal spung ryax phkngyan na'. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Smangus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Smangus hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Smangus hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Smangus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Smangus hya' ga Cinsbu. tay 'zil na Smangus hya' ga Yuluw. giway rgrgyax qu qalang. cyux kwara' qhuniq balung rgyax. Maki squ Sincik cyu kyahu na syesan sanmay, gleng nya ga be'tux llyung tkacing, 1500 kongci qu kingwagiq nya. inkahul lalu' na rhzyal psgagay musa' hmkangi' kki'an qu kinbkisan na 'Tayal sraral ga, s'agal nya "inrkyasan na rhzyal", "lalu'na abaw", "qsliq na inlungan"qu pslalu'. m_yan qani pslau', maki squ trang nasa ka yaqih tuqi' ru si ryax m'iyuw ngasal kki'an ga, mutux rmaw 'Tayal musa' mulu ru mkal llpyung. Cinsbu ga qutux qs'un mu' wagi sasan, bwan wagi krryax, zbusux qu uraw na rhzyal. Mrqwang ga puqing qsya'. Habun ga be'nux na syaw llyung. "Smangus" qani ga lalu' na qhuniq Smangus. mutux maki sa rgyax na qalang Smangus, Mrqwang, Cinsbu qu qhuniq Smangus qani, zbusux uraw qu inhuqan abaw nya, sqaniq na qqsinu qu bebway nya, yasa qu ini' pkzyay ru s'unan qqsinu qu rhzyal nya, ru mwah tngasal maki sqani qu kinbkisan Mrqwang, ru qs'un nha mita' ga qhuniq Smangus qu cyux maki' sa ana inu'! yasa sllwan nha Smangus la! lalu' na Smangus qani ga, mtrasul hmbku' qu Smangus, ini' pskyut qqsinu ru zbusux qu uraw na rhzyal. mutux mciriq squ Knazi na qsyap qu Smangus sraral, m'gaga' uzi, yasa psru' r'ra' mlahang pinbaq wahan squliq squ qalang Smangus. maki na' Gipun, krahu' balay pintriqan nqu Smangus ki Mknazi mixan, suru zyuwaw qani lga, mbzyaq tmwang maki squ qalang Rahaw ka Sinlo cwen ka qalang Slaq ki Cyocuy qu 'Tayal na Smangus hiya. ubuy Cikuto. t'aring maki qu Gipun ga pintbcyan nya sa Tozyen Mkgogan ting Mrqwang bang, sumangusu-sha. rekisi Kawas 1999, tkyokay qu Smangus. Kawas 1979, maki renki' na Smangus. Kawas 1991, 'lwan qu Smangus senmu cyun. t'aring qu zyuwaw na lmosay. Kawas 1995, suqun kbalay kwara' tuqi' 'san na Smangus. Sraral ga, siki hmkangi' zmagal tmucing tuqi' qsya' ru, musa' tehuk qalang Cinsbu maki bziran ru pqwsan lelqqi'. kayal qalang smpung kinhrhur nya' ga 15℃. qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. ngasal knalay qhuniq ru rruma' qu skalay nha ngasal qu qalang Smangus, ktan ta' knalay na qnuniq ki rruma' ka ngasal 'Tayal sa qalang Smangus. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. tuqi' na gaga' qalang Y_hwe na qalang Smangus "msqun mtzyuwaw qutux qalang"qu qalang Smangu, s'agal nha gaga'na 'Tayal ru smi'mqeru'pu'ki cyugal hwe ka nonye, kongcen, wenhwa cyawyu, cingci, yenba, zensi, hwancing ziyuen, canting minsu pu', cyugal hwe ga canglaw hwe, sencyu bacan syehwe ru kongtong cinging tahew qu tuqi'glgan nha gaga'. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san cyawtwong kwanci Kya qu canye tawlu kwanci nya qu tuqi' musa' smangus. Kwanci lutwan ga aring cu 60 syen 39.5K ka tuqi' qara' qalang Thyakan tehuk smangus. Kawas 2013 zmagal byacing mpusal mpitu' ryax tehuk mtzyu' byacing mpu zmagal ryax qu syentawcy. Kawas 2013 te mtzyu' byacing mpu mtzyu' ryax lga, phugun nya la! basu kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. hmgiru lmosay 司馬庫斯神木 (Yaya Qparung) Qhuniq na Yaya Qparung ga "qparung". Te sazing, te cyugal linpgan lalu' na yaya' qparung ga cyux maki sa Smangus. 司立富瀑布 (Tgliq Slibo) 司馬庫斯神木群 (Yaya Qparung): 神秘谷瀑布 (R'ra Minnanak Na Llyung) 生態公園 (Koraw Blaq Na Hiyal) 天空之城 (Mita Kayal) 夫妻樹 (Qegiy) spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh qzimux

Smangus ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 38 buwan, 176 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 173 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, Amis 1%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. lalu' na qalang Smangus hya ga "qalang na yaba' utux kayal" uzi. Smangus hya ga cyux maki sa qalang rgyax na Nahuy squ Sincik, 1,500 meta qu kinqwagiq nya. Smangus ga Cyens syang Yufong cun te 14 ling ka llyung blblaq. 'Tayal kwara' qu cyux maki squ Smangus. cyux maki squ zzik balay rgyax qu Smangus, ru yaqih qu tuqi' nya, ru ini' wahi rengki', yasa sllwan ssquliq mha "qalang mnkum", ru hiya qu cyux maki squ zzik balay rgyax na qalang ka kwara' qalang Gyencumin Taywan. ki'an cingay Yaya' qparung, ru wahan lmosay mita' mcisal llpung hogal. pzyang balay hopa' qalang cyux mksobih sa Smangus ga qalang Cikuto, ana ga aring Cikuto ga cyugal spung ryax phkngyan na'. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Smangus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Smangus hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Smangus hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Smangus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Smangus hya' ga Cinsbu. tay 'zil na Smangus hya' ga Yuluw. giway rgrgyax qu qalang. cyux kwara' qhuniq balung rgyax. Maki squ Sincik cyu kyahu na syesan sanmay, gleng nya ga be'tux llyung tkacing, 1500 kongci qu kingwagiq nya. inkahul lalu' na rhzyal psgagay musa' hmkangi' kki'an qu kinbkisan na 'Tayal sraral ga, s'agal nya "inrkyasan na rhzyal", "lalu'na abaw", "qsliq na inlungan"qu pslalu'. m_yan qani pslau', maki squ trang nasa ka yaqih tuqi' ru si ryax m'iyuw ngasal kki'an ga, mutux rmaw 'Tayal musa' mulu ru mkal llpyung. Cinsbu ga qutux qs'un mu' wagi sasan, bwan wagi krryax, zbusux qu uraw na rhzyal. Mrqwang ga puqing qsya'. Habun ga be'nux na syaw llyung. "Smangus" qani ga lalu' na qhuniq Smangus. mutux maki sa rgyax na qalang Smangus, Mrqwang, Cinsbu qu qhuniq Smangus qani, zbusux uraw qu inhuqan abaw nya, sqaniq na qqsinu qu bebway nya, yasa qu ini' pkzyay ru s'unan qqsinu qu rhzyal nya, ru mwah tngasal maki sqani qu kinbkisan Mrqwang, ru qs'un nha mita' ga qhuniq Smangus qu cyux maki' sa ana inu'! yasa sllwan nha Smangus la! lalu' na Smangus qani ga, mtrasul hmbku' qu Smangus, ini' pskyut qqsinu ru zbusux qu uraw na rhzyal. mutux mciriq squ Knazi na qsyap qu Smangus sraral, m'gaga' uzi, yasa psru' r'ra' mlahang pinbaq wahan squliq squ qalang Smangus. maki na' Gipun, krahu' balay pintriqan nqu Smangus ki Mknazi mixan, suru zyuwaw qani lga, mbzyaq tmwang maki squ qalang Rahaw ka Sinlo cwen ka qalang Slaq ki Cyocuy qu 'Tayal na Smangus hiya. ubuy Cikuto. t'aring maki qu Gipun ga pintbcyan nya sa Tozyen Mkgogan ting Mrqwang bang, sumangusu-sha. rekisi Kawas 1999, tkyokay qu Smangus. Kawas 1979, maki renki' na Smangus. Kawas 1991, 'lwan qu Smangus senmu cyun. t'aring qu zyuwaw na lmosay. Kawas 1995, suqun kbalay kwara' tuqi' 'san na Smangus. Sraral ga, siki hmkangi' zmagal tmucing tuqi' qsya' ru, musa' tehuk qalang Cinsbu maki bziran ru pqwsan lelqqi'. kayal qalang smpung kinhrhur nya' ga 15℃. qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. ngasal knalay qhuniq ru rruma' qu skalay nha ngasal qu qalang Smangus, ktan ta' knalay na qnuniq ki rruma' ka ngasal 'Tayal sa qalang Smangus. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. tuqi' na gaga' qalang Y_hwe na qalang Smangus "msqun mtzyuwaw qutux qalang"qu qalang Smangu, s'agal nha gaga'na 'Tayal ru smi'mqeru'pu'ki cyugal hwe ka nonye, kongcen, wenhwa cyawyu, cingci, yenba, zensi, hwancing ziyuen, canting minsu pu', cyugal hwe ga canglaw hwe, sencyu bacan syehwe ru kongtong cinging tahew qu tuqi'glgan nha gaga'. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san cyawtwong kwanci Kya qu canye tawlu kwanci nya qu tuqi' musa' smangus. Kwanci lutwan ga aring cu 60 syen 39.5K ka tuqi' qara' qalang Thyakan tehuk smangus. Kawas 2013 zmagal byacing mpusal mpitu' ryax tehuk mtzyu' byacing mpu zmagal ryax qu syentawcy. Kawas 2013 te mtzyu' byacing mpu mtzyu' ryax lga, phugun nya la! basu kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. hmgiru lmosay 司馬庫斯神木 (Yaya Qparung) Qhuniq na Yaya Qparung ga "qparung". Te sazing, te cyugal linpgan lalu' na yaya' qparung ga cyux maki sa Smangus. 司立富瀑布 (Tgliq Slibo) 司馬庫斯神木群 (Yaya Qparung): 神秘谷瀑布 (R'ra Minnanak Na Llyung) 生態公園 (Koraw Blaq Na Hiyal) 天空之城 (Mita Kayal) 夫妻樹 (Qegiy) spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh qzimux
S.PHON: s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. laluʔ na qalaŋ s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ħja ɣa "qalaŋ na jaβaʔ utux kajal" uzi. s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ħja ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕa qalaŋ rɣjax na naħuj s~ɕqu s~ɕinʦ~ʨik, *,*** meta qu kinqwaɣiq nja. s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ɣa ʦ~ʨjens~ɕ s~ɕjaŋ ju*oŋ ʦ~ʨun te ** liŋ ka lljuŋ βlβlaq. ʔtajal kwaraʔ qu ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu zzik βalaj rɣjax qu s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ, ru jaqiħ qu tuqiʔ nja, ru iniʔ waħi reŋkiʔ, jas~ɕa s~ɕllwan s~ɕs~ɕquliq mħa "qalaŋ mnkum", ru ħija qu ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu zzik βalaj rɣjax na qalaŋ ka kwaraʔ qalaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin tajwan. kiʔan ʦ~ʨiŋaj jajaʔ qparuŋ, ru waħan lmos~ɕaj mitaʔ mʦ~ʨis~ɕal llpuŋ ħoɣal. pzjaŋ βalaj ħopaʔ qalaŋ ʦ~ʨjux mks~ɕoβiħ s~ɕa s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ɣa qalaŋ ʦ~ʨikuto, ana ɣa ariŋ ʦ~ʨikuto ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕpuŋ rjax pħkŋjan naʔ. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu. taj ʔzil na s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa juluw. ɣiwaj rɣrɣjax qu qalaŋ. ʦ~ʨjux kwaraʔ qħuniq βaluŋ rɣjax. maki s~ɕqu s~ɕinʦ~ʨik ʦ~ʨju kjaħu na s~ɕjes~ɕan s~ɕanmaj, ɣleŋ nja ɣa βeʔtux lljuŋ tkaʦ~ʨiŋ, **** koŋʦ~ʨi qu kiŋwaɣiq nja. inkaħul laluʔ na rħzjal ps~ɕɣaɣaj mus~ɕaʔ ħmkaŋiʔ kkiʔan qu kinβkis~ɕan na ʔtajal s~ɕraral ɣa, s~ɕʔaɣal nja "inrkjas~ɕan na rħzjal", "laluʔna aβaw", "qs~ɕliq na inluŋan"qu ps~ɕlaluʔ. məjan qani ps~ɕlauʔ, maki s~ɕqu traŋ nas~ɕa ka jaqiħ tuqiʔ ru s~ɕi rjax mʔijuw ŋas~ɕal kkiʔan ɣa, mutux rmaw ʔtajal mus~ɕaʔ mulu ru mkal llpjuŋ. ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa qutux qs~ɕʔun muʔ waɣi s~ɕas~ɕan, βwan waɣi krrjax, zβus~ɕux qu uraw na rħzjal. mrqwaŋ ɣa puqiŋ qs~ɕjaʔ. ħaβun ɣa βeʔnux na s~ɕjaw lljuŋ. "s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ" qani ɣa laluʔ na qħuniq s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. mutux maki s~ɕa rɣjax na qalaŋ s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ, mrqwaŋ, ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu qu qħuniq s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ qani, zβus~ɕux uraw qu inħuqan aβaw nja, s~ɕqaniq na qqs~ɕinu qu βeβwaj nja, jas~ɕa qu iniʔ pkzjaj ru s~ɕʔunan qqs~ɕinu qu rħzjal nja, ru mwaħ tŋas~ɕal maki s~ɕqani qu kinβkis~ɕan mrqwaŋ, ru qs~ɕʔun nħa mitaʔ ɣa qħuniq s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ qu ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ s~ɕa ana inuʔ! jas~ɕa s~ɕllwan nħa s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ la! laluʔ na s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ qani ɣa, mtras~ɕul ħmβkuʔ qu s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ, iniʔ ps~ɕkjut qqs~ɕinu ru zβus~ɕux qu uraw na rħzjal. mutux mʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕqu knazi na qs~ɕjap qu s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ s~ɕraral, mʔɣaɣaʔ uzi, jas~ɕa ps~ɕruʔ rʔraʔ mlaħaŋ pinβaq waħan s~ɕquliq s~ɕqu qalaŋ s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. maki naʔ ɣipun, kraħuʔ βalaj pintriqan nqu s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ki mknazi mixan, s~ɕuru zjuwaw qani lɣa, mβzjaq tmwaŋ maki s~ɕqu qalaŋ raħaw ka s~ɕinlo ʦ~ʨwen ka qalaŋ s~ɕlaq ki ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj qu ʔtajal na s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ ħija. uβuj ʦ~ʨikuto. tʔariŋ maki qu ɣipun ɣa pintβʦ~ʨjan nja s~ɕa tozjen mkɣoɣan tiŋ mrqwaŋ βaŋ, s~ɕumaŋus~ɕu-s~ɕħa. rekis~ɕi kawas~ɕ ****, tkjokaj qu s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. kawas~ɕ ****, maki renkiʔ na s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. kawas~ɕ ****, ʔlwan qu s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ s~ɕenmu ʦ~ʨjun. tʔariŋ qu zjuwaw na lmos~ɕaj. kawas~ɕ ****, s~ɕuqun kβalaj kwaraʔ tuqiʔ ʔs~ɕan na s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. s~ɕraral ɣa, s~ɕiki ħmkaŋiʔ zmaɣal tmuʦ~ʨiŋ tuqiʔ qs~ɕjaʔ ru, mus~ɕaʔ teħuk qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu maki βziran ru pqws~ɕan lelqqiʔ. kajal qalaŋ s~ɕmpuŋ kinħrħur njaʔ ɣa ***. qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. ŋas~ɕal knalaj qħuniq ru rrumaʔ qu s~ɕkalaj nħa ŋas~ɕal qu qalaŋ s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ, ktan taʔ knalaj na qnuniq ki rrumaʔ ka ŋas~ɕal ʔtajal s~ɕa qalaŋ s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. kjokaj maki * kjokaj. tuqiʔ na ɣaɣaʔ qalaŋ jəħwe na qalaŋ s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ "ms~ɕqun mtzjuwaw qutux qalaŋ"qu qalaŋ s~ɕmaŋu, s~ɕʔaɣal nħa ɣaɣaʔna ʔtajal ru s~ɕmiʔmqeruʔpuʔki ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħwe ka nonje, koŋʦ~ʨen, wenħwa ʦ~ʨjawju, ʦ~ʨiŋʦ~ʨi, jenβa, zens~ɕi, ħwanʦ~ʨiŋ zijuen, ʦ~ʨantiŋ mins~ɕu puʔ, ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħwe ɣa ʦ~ʨaŋlaw ħwe, s~ɕenʦ~ʨju βaʦ~ʨan s~ɕjeħwe ru koŋtoŋ ʦ~ʨiŋiŋ taħew qu tuqiʔɣlɣan nħa ɣaɣaʔ. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan ʦ~ʨjawtwoŋ kwanʦ~ʨi kja qu ʦ~ʨanje tawlu kwanʦ~ʨi nja qu tuqiʔ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. kwanʦ~ʨi lutwan ɣa ariŋ ʦ~ʨu ** s~ɕjen **.*k ka tuqiʔ qaraʔ qalaŋ tħjakan teħuk s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. kawas~ɕ **** zmaɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mpus~ɕal mpituʔ rjax teħuk mtzjuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mpu zmaɣal rjax qu s~ɕjentawʦ~ʨj. kawas~ɕ **** te mtzjuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mpu mtzjuʔ rjax lɣa, pħuɣun nja la! βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj ****** (jaja qparuŋ) qħuniq na jaja qparuŋ ɣa "qparuŋ". te s~ɕaziŋ, te ʦ~ʨjuɣal linpɣan laluʔ na jajaʔ qparuŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕa s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. ***** (tɣliq s~ɕliβo) ******* (jaja qparuŋ): ***** (rʔra minnanak na lljuŋ) **** (koraw βlaq na ħijal) **** (mita kajal) *** (qeɣij) s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ qzimux
